column1: # G600 button definitions — single source of truth for signal detection and UI.
#   button_id    unique key used in profiles and routing maps
#   label        display name shown in UI
#                EV_ABS: bitmask to AND against event.value; non-zero = pressed
#   locked       true = never reassignable (hardware primary clicks)
#   zone         UI grouping hint: main / thumb / control
# Confirmed by hardware discovery 2026-03-19 (three-interface evdev dump).
# if01 bitmask axis=40 confirmed values: GS=32 (bit5).
# kbd codes reflect Piper onboard-flash remapping as of 2026-03-19.
